actions.description: The shot opens on the decorated oak, hedges, path, and house in warm autumn light.
The camera eases closer as balloons bob, ghost decorations flutter, and spiderwebs ripple.
Focus settles on the glowing jack-o-lantern beneath the tree while decorations continue to sway.
